_meta.description: Curated Oracle CPU/PSU patch index. Source: MOS Doc 2118136.2 + Oracle Critical Patch Update advisories + dbsguru.com + oraclepatches.com.
_meta.note: Jan 2026 CPU (2026-Q1) released 2026-01-20; Apr 2026 CPU (2026-Q2) released 2026-04-21 (DB RUs delayed to 28-Apr). Oracle 23ai rebranded to 26ai as of Jan 2026. CVE-2026-21992 (CVSS 9.8, RCE in Oracle Net listener) released as OOB Security Alert on 2026-03-20 — apply immediately if not on current RU.

release_update_patches.label: 19.31 RU (Apr 2026 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Includes fix for OOB Security Alert CVE-2026-21992 (CVSS 9.8, unauthenticated RCE in Oracle Net listener). 26 new DB security patches this quarter. DB RUs were delayed 1 week post-advisory; available from 28-Apr-2026.

release_update_patches.label: 19.30 RU (Jan 2026 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: 337 vulnerabilities fixed across Oracle portfolio this quarter. 19.30 RU includes database Core RDBMS and OJVM fixes. Note: 19.30 release date was delayed to 2026-01-30 (patch pushed back from initial Jan-21 date).

release_update_patches.label: 19.29 RU (Oct 2025 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: October 2025 quarterly bundle. Core RDBMS, OJVM, and XML DB security fixes.

release_update_patches.label: 19.27 RU (Jan 2025 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Addresses 3 critical RCE vulnerabilities in OJVM and XML DB components. CVSS 9.8 in CVE-2024-21287.

release_update_patches.label: 19.26 RU (Oct 2024 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Privilege escalation fix in Oracle Database Vault and Data Redaction.

release_update_patches.label: 19.25 RU (Jul 2024 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: SQL injection vulnerability in DBMS_SCHEDULER and Core RDBMS fixes.

release_update_patches.label: 19.24 RU (Apr 2024 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Critical: unauthorized data access via XML DB (CVE-2024-20982, CVSS 9.1).

release_update_patches.label: 21.22 RU (Apr 2026 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Available immediately (no delay). Includes CVE-2026-21992 (CVSS 9.8 network listener RCE). 21c OJVM fixes embedded in DB RU (no separate OJVM patch for 21c).

release_update_patches.label: 21.20 RU (Oct 2025 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: October 2025 quarterly bundle. OJVM fixes embedded in DB RU.

release_update_patches.label: 21.16 RU (Jan 2025 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Same OJVM critical (CVE-2024-21287 CVSS 9.8) as 19c bundle.

release_update_patches.label: 21.15 RU (Oct 2024 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Oracle Database Vault privilege escalation fix.

release_update_patches.label: 23.26.2 RU (Apr 2026 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: 26ai receives combined RU bundles. Includes Apr 2026 security fixes. Note: Oracle rebranded 23ai innovation release to 26ai in Jan 2026; cloud users can patch forward from 23ai without re-certification.

release_update_patches.label: 23.7 RU (Jan 2025 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: OJVM critical CVE. 23ai receives combined RU+OJVM bundles. Rebranded to 26ai in Jan 2026.

23ai.eol_warning: Oracle 23ai was rebranded to Oracle AI Database 26ai in January 2026. Use the 26ai section for current patch data. Existing 23ai installations should upgrade to the 26ai patch stream.

release_update_patches.label: 12.2.0.1 DBRU (Jul 2024 CPU)
release_update_patches.highlights: Final extended support CPU for 12.2 (EOL Dec 2024). Upgrade recommended.

12.2.eol_warning: Oracle Database 12.2 reached end of Extended Support in December 2024. No further CPUs will be released. Upgrade to 19c or later.

18c.eol_warning: Oracle Database 18c reached end of Extended Support in June 2021. No further CPUs are released. Immediate upgrade required.

latest_adop_bundle.label: EBS 12.2.13 Release Update Pack
latest_adop_bundle.highlights: 12.2.13 RUP. Prerequisite: DB patch 36209512 (19.24+). Addresses 2 HIGH CVEs in Applications Framework. Apr 2026 CPU EBS document: MOS KA1539. Apply Apr 2026 DB patches to underlying Oracle Database for full coverage.
